name: Lumu
description: Continuous compromise assessment platform that measures confirmed instances of compromise in real time using network metadata analysis

actions.name: Get Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve active compromise incidents from Lumu

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by incident status (open, muted, closed)

parameters.name: adversary_types
parameters.description: Filter by adversary type (C2, Malware, DGA, Mining, Phishing, Spam)

parameters.name: from_date
parameters.description: Start date filter in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: to_date
parameters.description: End date filter in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of incidents to return

actions.name: Get Incident Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific incident

actions.name: Get Incident Context
actions.description: Retrieve context and indicators of compromise associated with an incident

actions.name: Get Compromises
actions.description: Retrieve confirmed compromise contacts from Lumu

parameters.name: from_date
parameters.description: Start date filter in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: to_date
parameters.description: End date filter in ISO 8601 format

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of compromises to return

actions.name: Mute Incident
actions.description: Mute an incident to suppress notifications while keeping it tracked

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment explaining why the incident is being muted

actions.name: Push Custom Collector Data
actions.description: Push DNS queries or proxy logs to Lumu for analysis via custom collector

parameters.name: queries
parameters.description: Array of DNS query objects to submit for analysis
